title: Mondoro Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Mondoro with a Z-Score of +5.94. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Mondoro are extreme, with a critical heat wave warning issued. 
 The Z-Score of +5.94 indicates a significant deviation from the average temperature, with 19.8 GG of Cooling Degree Days. 
 The relative humidity is at 25% and wind speed is 3.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Mondoro.
